title: equisetum debile var. majus
intro: Equisetum debile var. majus, also known as giant horsetail, is a species of vascular plant in the family Equisetaceae, characterized by its tall, hollow stems and whorled leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The health benefits of Equisetum debile var. majus include its potential to treat urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
